sections.paragraph:
Original: אתא אתה

Transliteration: 'âthâh 'âthâ'

Phonetic: aw-thaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to come, arrive
    1. (Qal) to come (of men, time, beasts, calamity)
    2. (Hiphil) to bring

Origin: a primitive root [collateral to H225 contraction]

TWOT entry: 188

Part(s) of speech: Verb
